name: Monopoly
description: Monopoly is the world's most-played, most-argued-about board game — buy real estate around an Atlantic City–inspired track, charge rent, build houses and hotels, and bankrupt every opponent. Originally Elizabeth Magie's 1903 critique of capitalism ("The Landlord's Game"), it was repackaged by Charles Darrow and Parker Brothers in 1935 and has divided families ever since. Dice, deeds, and hours.
